//: Modify these values to quickly reconfigure the application

app.name: Tacker
app.description: Track your LeetCode interview preparation questions.

api.//: The base URL for the API. In development, this usually points to the mock-server.
You can also override this using the NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL environment variable.
Timeout in milliseconds for API requests

features.//: Enable or disable Google OAuth Authentication
Whether to hide the 'Explore' tab globally
